raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current challenges","name":"What feels unclear or heavier than it should right now?","description":"Explores current uncertainties or burdens.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Punctuality impact","name":"How do you think your punctuality affects the team or project timelines?","description":"Probes the impact of punctuality on team trust and project management.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Design ownership","name":"What does taking full ownership of a design project mean to you?","description":"Explores their understanding and approach to owning projects fully.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Leadership growth","name":"What areas of design leadership do you want to develop current workload feel sustainable over the next few months?","description":"Checks if the workload is manageable and sustainable.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Engagement level","name":"What aspects of your work are most engaging to you right now?","description":"Surfaces what currently drives motivation and engagement.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priorities moving forward","name":"What are your top priorities for the next quarter?","description":"Clarifies immediate priorities and alignment with goals.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next steps","name":"What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Drives toward actionable steps following the discussion.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
